title: JCB Industrial Digitalization
description: Manufacturing digital transformation — process automation and Power Platform solutions at JCB India.
problem: Manual manufacturing workflows slowed equipment handovers, approvals, and cross-team coordination on the shop floor.
solution: Designed and deployed Power Apps interfaces, Power Automate flows, and SharePoint integrations to digitize handover and approval processes.
impact: Streamlined operational workflows, reduced manual follow-ups, and improved visibility for manufacturing teams.
demoCaption: Digitizing equipment handovers and approvals at JCB India

title: Equipment Handover System
description: Automated approval routing and tracking for manufacturing equipment handovers.
problem: Manual approval process causing delays in equipment handover workflows across manufacturing teams.
solution: Built a Power Apps + Power Automate workflow that routes approvals, tracks status, and notifies stakeholders in real time.
impact: Automated approval routing and tracking — reducing handover cycle time and eliminating manual follow-ups.
demoCaption: Real-time approval routing for manufacturing handovers

title: AI Manufacturing Assistant
description: AI assistant trained on manufacturing knowledge for faster operational insights.
problem: Operators spend significant time searching for information across manuals, SOPs, and tribal knowledge.
solution: Built an AI assistant with RAG over manufacturing documentation, enabling natural-language queries on the shop floor.
impact: Faster access to operational insights — operators get answers in seconds instead of minutes.

title: FraudGuard
description: AI-powered fraud detection with real-time monitoring and risk analysis.
problem: Fraud detection systems often miss subtle patterns and react too slowly to emerging threats.
solution: Developed an AI-powered fraud detection platform with pattern recognition, anomaly scoring, and real-time alerts.
impact: Real-time monitoring and risk analysis — catching suspicious activity before it escalates.
demoCaption: Real-time fraud detection and risk scoring dashboard
